card_description: Carl Jung is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Appears in 2 Exegesis passages. Associated with dictionary terms: Carl Jung. Context: "Dick performs a clinical meta-analysis of his own "psychosis," suggesting that 3-74 was a "biological adaptative system" where religious archetypes (Brahman/Christ) acted as a "metabolic toxin" that destroyed his paranoid complex."
